response.global_analysis: The audio features initial dialogue among Hololive members (Aki Rosenthal, Shirakami Fubuki, Houshou Marine), followed by a transition and a performance of 'JANE DOE' by Kenshi Yonezu. The song is performed by Aki Rosenthal and a guest male performer. The reference JSON lyrics match the first half of the performance but are incomplete for the second half; I have transcribed and translated the remaining lyrics and concluding dialogue based on audio. Timestamps are strictly tied to vocal audio onset and offset.

subtitles.original: わー早っ！
お忙しい人気者だ
お忙しいわ！
アキロゼ、お誕生日おめでとう！
おめでとう！おめでとう！
ありがとう！キャプ美ありがとう！
みんな、ありがとうー！
あー、賑やかで楽しかった…
subtitles.english: Ah, it was so lively and fun...

subtitles.original: JANE DOE
まるでこの世界で二人だけみたいだね
subtitles.english: It's as if we were the only two left in this world

subtitles.original: なんて少しだけ夢をみてしまっただけ
subtitles.english: I just couldn't resist dreaming for a bit

subtitles.original: つま先に月明かり 花束の香り
subtitles.english: Moonlight on my tiptoes, the scent of a bouquet

subtitles.original: 指に触れる指
さよなら もう行かなきゃ
subtitles.english: Goodbye, I have to go now

subtitles.original: 何もかも忘れて
硝子の上を裸足のまま歩く
痛むごとに 血が流れて 落ちていく
subtitles.english: With every step, blood flows and falls

subtitles.original: お願い その赤い足跡を
たどって 会いに来て
錆びたプールに放たれていく金魚
subtitles.english: A goldfish released into a rusty pool

subtitles.original: 靴箱の中に隠したリンゴ
subtitles.english: An apple hidden inside a shoebox

subtitles.original: しなびた君の肌にぬかるみ
傷跡 犬のように泳いだ迷子
subtitles.english: Like a scar, a lost child swimming like a dog

subtitles.original: どこにいるよ
何をしてるの
この世を間違いで満たそう
subtitles.english: Let's fill this world with mistakes

subtitles.original: そばにいたよ
遊びに行こうよ
どこにいるの
硝子の上を裸足のまま歩く
痛むごとに 血が流れて 落ちていく
subtitles.english: With every step, blood flows and falls

subtitles.original: お願い その赤い足跡を
たどって 会いに来て
まるでこの世界で二人だけみたいだね
subtitles.english: It's as if we were the only two left in this world

subtitles.original: なんて少しだけ夢をみてしまっただけ
subtitles.english: I just couldn't resist dreaming for a bit

subtitles.original: さあ、選択の時だ
コイン？
